summary: Customer DraftView redesign testing completed successfully. All UI elements verified: mobile-first layout, new header with title/subtitle/delivery badge, simplified product cards without plasiyer-only info, quantity input with suggestion as placeholder (not prefilled), stepper functionality, bottom sticky bar with summary and review button. Backend APIs verified working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions on mobile - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. This is a minor Recharts issue when chart container is not visible.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Ailem Market test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer DraftView redesign fully tested. Key findings: 1) Title 'Sipariş Oluştur' with subtitle 'Size özel önerilen ürünlerle hızlı sipariş verin'. 2) Delivery badge shows 'Teslimat: Cuma' from real route data. 3) Countdown badge shows remaining time. 4) Product cards show: product name, unit info (Birim: Şişe/Adet), suggestion badge (Önerilen: X), explanation text, quantity stepper with manual input. 5) CRITICAL: Quantity input value is EMPTY, suggestion appears as PLACEHOLDER only (verified: value='', placeholder='300'). 6) No plasiyer-only technical info (depot stock, plasiyer stock, logistics) in product cards. 7) Badges show only when real data exists (e.g., 'Bu ürün hızlı tükeniyor' for fast-selling). 8) Bottom sticky bar shows 'SIPARIŞ ÖZETİ' with 'X ürün • Y adet' and button 'Siparişi Gözden Geçir'. 9) Submit button is disabled when totalQuantity=0. 10) Responsive layout works on mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px). 11) Search functionality filters products correctly. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

ui_elements_verified.title: Sipariş Oluştur - data-testid='customer-order-title'
ui_elements_verified.subtitle: Size özel önerilen ürünlerle hızlı sipariş verin - data-testid='customer-order-subtitle'

quantity_input_verification.conclusion: PASS - Suggestion is placeholder only, not prefilled value

responsive_layout.mobile_390px: Single column layout, bottom nav visible, sidebar hidden
responsive_layout.tablet_768px: Single column layout, bottom nav visible, sidebar hidden
responsive_layout.desktop_1920px: Sidebar visible, max-w-4xl content area, bottom bar spans content
